specific_question: What percentage of copywriters on the marketing team cited "tight deadlines" and "insufficient training" as key causes of high stress in the anonymous employee satisfaction survey for Q4 2024?
answer: According to the Q4 2024 anonymous employee satisfaction survey, 30% of the copywriting team have attributed their stress to "tight deadlines", while 33% reported "insufficient training" as another key reason.
dr_question: Given the rise of AI-based knowledge management systems, what strategies can Lee's Market's knowledge management team implement to help maintain low employee turnover rates through 2027?
